howItWorks.intro: This api rate limit calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Peak RPS = Average RPS × Peak Multiplier
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How do I calculate rate limits?
faq.answer: Divide daily requests by 86,400 seconds for average RPS. Multiply by 2-5x for peak traffic. Then ensure your infrastructure can handle peak concurrent connections.

howWeCalculate.intro: This api rate limit calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
